purpose: Experimental WIP resource-seeded FH6 import template. Import once into a 3000-circle template, save/reload, then use that saved vinyl as a reusable import template.
notes: Tiny, nearly transparent seed layers are intended to make FH6 create live resources for supported shape words.
The app seed-import button intentionally does not trim/cull the group count after writing this file.
After importing this seed, save and reload in FH6 before using the vinyl as a template.
